subcodes.first_line: O thou who revileth! By the life of God, thou hast transgressed the bounds of justice, truth, and fairness in thy judgment upon 'Umar, for he ruled in accordance with the principles of Islam [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طاعن لعمر الله تجاوزت العدل و الصدق و الانصاف حکومت عمر از برای اسلام
